data.title: Orbiter Finance Launches Cross-Chain Swap Function
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Orbiter Finance cross-chain flash exchange function is officially launched, now supporting 50+ public chains and 100+ tokens with one-click instant exchange, realizing seamless combination of cross-chain bridging and asset flash exchange. Users can experience low-fee multi-chain Swap service on the official website to improve the efficiency of multi-chain asset interaction.

data.title: Planet Morning News
$49.78 million worth of SOL was unlocked 1 hour ago, of which $33.27 million has been transferred to CEX
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, 425,266 SOL (worth about 49.78 million US dollars) were unlocked an hour ago. Among them, 284,147 SOL (worth about 33.27 million US dollars) have been transferred to exchanges such as Binance, Kraken and Coinbase.

data.title: Market Uncertainty Persists Amid Global Tariff Developments
data.description:
According to Odaily, top trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio shared his insights on the market outlook following the implementation of tariffs. He noted that the current global macroeconomic situation is fraught with uncertainty, with market expectations nearly nullified. The current pricing suggests a non-zero probability that U.S. President Donald Trump might revoke the tariffs, though the likelihood and timing remain indeterminate. Despite the binary nature of the outcome, the process is unpredictable.

In the cryptocurrency market, Bitcoin continues to demonstrate remarkable resilience, indicating that some market participants still view it as a potential alternative to gold, though this remains speculative. Other asset classes are experiencing significant turmoil. Small and mid-cap tokens, as reflected in the Total3 index, are languishing in obscurity with dismal performance.

There is a need for caution regarding institutional investment targets, as a wave of LP redemptions is anticipated this year. This could lead to the forced selling of popular assets.

data.title: Upcoming Nomination Hearing to Address Key Issues in Banking and Crypto
data.description: According to Odaily, a significant nomination hearing involving the banking and crypto industries is scheduled for next Thursday. The U.S. Senate Banking Committee, led by Republicans, will convene to question Federal Reserve Governor Michelle Bowman, who has been selected by U.S. President Donald Trump to replace Michael Barr as the next Vice Chair for Supervision. In this role, Bowman will play a crucial part in overseeing and regulating banking activities related to cryptocurrencies. It is anticipated that the Republican committee members will raise numerous questions regarding the process of debanking, the Federal Reserve's stance on digital assets, and its approach to handling the crypto industry.

data.title: A hearing for Federal Reserve board members is expected to take place next Thursday regarding the central bank’s stance on digital assets.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett wrote on the X platform that the banking and crypto industries will hold an important nomination hearing next Thursday, when the US Republican Senate Banking Committee will hold a meeting to question Federal Reserve Board member Michelle Bowman (Trump chose her to replace Michael Barr as the next Vice Chairman of Supervision). In this position, Bowman will become a key player in supervising and regulating bank crypto-related activities, and the Republicans are expected to raise many questions about de-banking, the Fed's stance on digital assets, and its approach to the crypto industry.

data.title: Trader Eugene: This year's potential LP redemption wave may trigger a token sell-off
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Top trader Eugene Ng Ah Sio published his market views after the tariffs were implemented on his personal channel, saying that there is no certainty in the current global macroeconomic forecast. The expected market value is almost zero, and the current pricing implies a non-zero probability that Trump may withdraw the tariffs, but the specific possibility and time node cannot be determined-although the result is either this or that, the process is full of variables.
In the crypto market, Bitcoin still shows amazing resilience, indicating that some market participants still regard it as a substitute for gold (only speculation). Other asset classes are in a mess. Small and medium-sized market value tokens (Total3 Index) are still in the abyss of no one, and the performance is terrible. Be wary of institutional group targets-it is expected that this year will usher in a wave of LP redemptions, which will trigger passive selling of popular targets.

data.title: Aptos Lianchuang: Aptos is building a global trading engine
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Aptos co-founder avery said on the X platform that Aptos is building a global trading engine. From stablecoins to RWA, from underlying performance to cross-chain experience, Aptos is building a new generation of global financial system that runs around the clock, borderless, and on-chain.

data.title: Gate.io launches EDGE perpetual contract, supporting up to 50x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io has launched EDGE perpetual contract real-time trading (USDT settlement), supporting 1-50 times leverage.

data.title: A whale sold $9.67 million worth of IMX after the SEC concluded its investigation into Immutable
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, after the SEC ended its investigation into Immutable, the price of IMX has risen to a certain extent. A whale/institution took advantage of the situation and sold 17.17 million IMX (worth $960,000) in the past 8 days, with an average price of $0.56.
After he/she ended the investigation and the news of the increase in IMX price was issued, he/she deposited IMX into FalconX (institutional business brokerage platform), and then entered Binance from FalconX.
